description_long: This is a modern, compact house surrounded by several large, leafy trees, creating a sense of privacy and seclusion. The house features a flat roof and a clean, white exterior with large windows, allowing for ample natural light. A small, fenced-in front yard contains a green lawn, a parked car, and a patio area with outdoor furniture and potted plants. The driveway leads directly to the front of the house, and the entrance is marked by a simple door with minimal ornamentation. The property is bordered by a white picket fence, and the landscaping is neat and well-maintained. The overall design emphasizes simplicity, functionality, and integration with the surrounding greenery.
description: A modern, white flat-roofed house with large windows, surrounded by trees and a white picket fence, featuring a driveway, lawn, and patio area.
description_view_0: Front view showing the driveway, parked car, main entrance, patio, and fenced lawn with trees framing the house.
description_view_1: Rear angled view highlighting the dense tree coverage, back of the house, and partial visibility of the patio and car.
description_view_2: Side view with trees obscuring much of the house, but the white fence and some outdoor furniture are visible.
description_view_3: Back view dominated by trees, with only the upper part of the house and some windows visible above the foliage.
attribute_entryway_design: Simple main door with no steps, minimal overhang, and a small patio area adjacent to the entrance
